channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Vegetation spilling onto roadway on both sides, long overdue a cutback, 12th June
item.description:
The vegetation overgrowth stretches along the entirety of this section of Larkhay Road (about 75-100m), starting at the left fork of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhay Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 12th June
item.description:
Changing several post and some sign faces
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 12th June
item.description:
Remove fallen Willow tree off the residents house and shed and re-pollard the willow. Will need MEWP and Stop n go. (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge Ash tree , Ash die-back evident, huge branch overhanging the Public High Way ( Butts Lane), 12th June
item.description:
Ash tree along Butts Lane GL52 9QH on the boundary of 'The Meadows' but on Public Land.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Butt's Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Ash Tree located on Highway land

item.title: Poor quality of repairs, 12th June
item.description:
These potholes have only recently been repaired and they are already breaking up and the largest pothole was left unattended. Disgraceful workmanship and a waste of taxpayers money

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Douro Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding opposite Bulford close evevery time it rains,water is bypassing drain on the main road because it has partially collapsed, 12th June
item.description:
12 Lea Walk Hucclecote Road Gloucester
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Hucclecote Road, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Particularly bad patch of road in front of 7-9 Clyde Road, 12th June
item.description:
Particularly bad patch of road in front of 7-9 Clyde Road This area really needs to be added to a resurfacing programme

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clyde Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clyde Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
